title: Extend Item Hours in Calendar
excerpt: The Calendar View combined with a calendar sync is great as an admin tool for me. But when planning my week I want to assign a rough hourly block to items and it would be good to be able to extend blocks within the Calen…

posts.author: JackHeadford (Jack Headford)
posts.cookedHtml: The Calendar View combined with a calendar sync is great as an admin tool for me. But when planning my week I want to assign a rough hourly block to items and it would be good to be able to extend blocks within the Calendar View of a board.
